text: macOS stat -f formatting failed because agent shell resolved GNU stat; shell recipe should include a portable file-metadata command
Alias inspection guessed src/commands/aliases/helpers.ts because no local index documents the shared helper filename; a short aliases README or exported surface map would prevent the dead-end read.

Repo format script uses oxfmt, but invoking npx prettier silently fetched a different formatter and rewrote touched TypeScript with incompatible wrapping; a formatter guard or documented per-file command would prevent noisy diffs.

A shell verification snippet assigned to the zsh-reserved read-only variable `status`, aborting follow-on checks; shared shell guidance should list zsh reserved names or standardize agent execs on POSIX sh.
The papercuts CLI positional `-` stdin contract was not obvious and `--stdin` failed; showing the accepted stdin form in `papercuts add --help` examples would prevent a dead-end invocation.

A shell smoke-test loop treated quoted command strings as ordinary words and stopped after the first command; a shared helper for JSON-envelope smoke matrices would avoid fragile shell word-splitting.
zsh reserves the variable name status as read-only; shell verification cleanup wrappers should use rc instead

Nested alias parents such as 'elv agents tests' return missing-subcommand errors instead of the structured help envelope used by ops/config/spec parents; consistent parent-command help would make discovery first-try.
Repository lint script uses oxlint, which rejects the common --no-cache flag; a documented scoped lint invocation would prevent dead-end verification commands.

oxfmt rejects --check with --stdin-filepath, making it awkward to validate a historical file against repository formatting without writing a temporary in-tree file; a stdin check mode would prevent this dead end.
delegate Grok safe review was harness-cancelled after 44s while setting up an out-of-tree CLI probe; the completion report contained only progress text, so the review had to be retried

evidence.cmd: delegate --json --isolation auto --completion-report markdown grok safe --reasoning-effort high --prompt-file docs/reviews/round-4-grok-prompt.md

text: delegate Grok isolated review was harness-cancelled again after 309s because the reviewer spent time installing dependencies in the dependency-free worktree; review prompts need a built-in no-install guard or dependency-aware isolation

evidence.cmd: delegate --json --isolation worktree --completion-report markdown grok safe --reasoning-effort high --prompt-file docs/reviews/round-4-grok-prompt.md

text: delegate Grok final review was harness-cancelled after 418s after invoking the stale globally installed elv despite the review being against the source tree; reviewer isolation needs clearer source-binary provenance or a hard review timebox

evidence.cmd: delegate --json --isolation auto --completion-report markdown grok safe --reasoning-effort high --prompt-file docs/reviews/round-5-grok-prompt.md

text: Packed-artifact smoke via raw npm tar extraction failed before CLI startup because package dependencies were not installed; an offline artifact-smoke helper should link or stage existing node_modules automatically

evidence.cmd: npm pack --json; tar -xzf; node package/dist/cli.js spec status --offline

text: Using 'path' as a zsh loop variable mutates zsh's special path/PATH array, causing subsequent commands such as trash and mktemp to become command-not-found; shell guidance should explicitly reserve lowercase path in zsh

The obvious cold-start smoke 'elv spec status --offline' fails because spec status is already local-only but does not accept the shared --offline flag; either accept the no-op flag consistently or make help clearer
A multi-file apply_patch failed entirely because one fetch-spec context hunk did not match; smaller hunks or apply_patch diagnostics listing unchanged files would have prevented the retry.
